hero.name: João Guimarães
hero.card_bio: A Full-Stack Developer who builds clean and fast web experiences.
hero.tagline: Passionate about creating intuitive and engaging user experiences. I specialize in transforming ideas into beautifully crafted products.

projects.title: Project One
projects.description: A full-stack web application built with Next.js and TypeScript. Focused on performance and developer experience.

projects.title: Project Two
projects.description: A mobile-first e-commerce platform with real-time inventory management and seamless checkout flow.

projects.title: Project Three
projects.description: An open-source CLI tool that automates repetitive development tasks, saving hours of manual work.

items.description: Building and maintaining scalable web applications. Leading frontend architecture decisions and mentoring junior developers.
Developed reusable component libraries and improved application performance by 40% through code splitting and lazy loading.
Started my career building internal tools and dashboards. Gained solid foundations in React and REST APIs.

about.heading: About Me
about.bio:
I'm a full-stack developer based in Brazil, passionate about building products that are fast, accessible, and delightful to use. I have a strong focus on the web platform and love working across the stack — from designing APIs to crafting pixel-perfect UIs.

When I'm not coding, I'm probably exploring new tech, reading, or drinking way too much coffee.

contact.heading: Get in Touch
contact.body: I'm always open to new opportunities, collaborations, or just a friendly chat. Feel free to reach out!
